target: 8. Tokiko's Memory Part 2
Hishigata Tokiko

(About the phone call now…
Haine is serious…)
(If I become a Shadow…)

(If I need to stop Shinpai and the others,
my unexpected attack when they're not watching
would definitely be effective)

(But… even if it's something important,
I couldn't just accept it right away…)
Tokiko.
…Mother.
What's wrong? Your face looks pale.
Nothing.

No, it's not nothing. 
Let's talk a little with Mother.
Yeah…
Were you thinking about Mio?

I still can't believe it…
Mio and Shinpai, they were so close…
…Yeah.

You must have been really lonely.
I wanted to go to the festival with you.

U-uh… yeah.
Uhh… uuuhhh…!

I-I'm not…!
It's not like I'm crying… uuuhhh…!

Hehe, it's okay to cry.
You don't have to hold it in.

But… Dad and my brother…
Don't tell them, okay?
Okay, okay, it's fine.

Uhh, uuuu…!
That's you, Mother…

It was fun, I swear!
It was really fun…!

I've always…
I wanted it to stay like that!

Why!?
Why did this have to happen…!
Yeah…

I loved them…?
Mio too… Shinpai too…
Ku, uhh.
Yeah, yeah.

Everyone, I love them…
My older brother, Dad, Mom… 
Even Mio!
Tokiko's such a kind child.

Uck…,
No, I'm not kind at all…

(That's why I was chosen.
Not my older brother, but me…)

Hey, Tokiko.
You've got something else on your mind, don't you?

Eh…?
No, nothing…

I can see through you, Mother.
You've been looking troubled
even before Mio disappeared.

Or is it something
you can't tell Mother?

I'm sorry…
It's not just Mother,
I can't tell anyone…
Even Mio?
Yeah… I can't tell her at all.
…Hehe.
Why are you laughing…?

I thought you were just like Dad.
But… yeah.

From the source of that thing
you can't tell anyone about,
you can't run away?
No, I can't…

(While taking care of Haine,
feeding her… I thought I was on equal terms)

(But really, they're definitely in a better position…
I couldn't ignore what they asked me)

(And now, if I go back…
It'll affect Mio too…)
There's nothing I can do anymore…

That's right…
If I could, I'd take your place.
But I'm sure it'll be okay!
Eh…?

You can think of many things,
Tokiko.

So think carefully,
and make your own decision.
…Yeah.
Don't regret it.
Hehe… it's strange.

Looking at Mother's smiling face,
I feel like it'll be okay.

Thank you, Mother…
I'm happy you're here.

Oh, really?
I'm happy too.

Thank you.
You're really my Mother.

What an idiot.
There's no one else
who could be your Mother.
Hehe… that's right.

(Even if it's a plan,
I'll protect Mother and Mio.)
(If I get through the festival day…)
(And stay with my family forever…)

I guess I was thinking too hard.
But it's okay now.
I think it'll work out.
Hehe, I'm glad you're back.
Eh…?

Actually, I have
your favorite violets in syrup.
Really!?

Even though it's late, shall we have tea?
Of course, keep it a secret from Dad and your brother.

Thank you.
I'm really happy, but I can't right now.
I have something to do.

Oh, really?
Then let's do it tomorrow.
Yeah… see you tomorrow.
You're there, aren't you?

I don't know who you are,
but get out of here quickly?

You're really something.
You look just like me.

That's right.
If you weren't here,
I'd be the real one.

Yeah.
Then, I'll make it painless.

Yeah, I know.
Make sure you don't have any regrets.

Hehe.
I know…
Goodbye, me.
